arts.ttl: Arsenal's Mikel Arteta gives Ethan Nwaneri injury update and makes "dead body" Premier League title claim
arts.sum: Arsenal's Mikel Arteta insists he will give up the Premier League title over his dead body as he delivers an update on Ethan Nwaneri's fitness before Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues defiant four-word title message - with Arsenal 11 points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners had the chance to close the gap to five points on Saturday afternoon and were expected to do so at home against against 16th-placed West Ham .

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hits back at critics and says Arsenal should be MID-TABLE with their issues
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has leapt to Arsenal's defence and insists any team with their issues should be meandering in mid-table as he refused to give up on the Premier League title

arts.ttl: ‘Brushed under the carpet’: Troy Deeney says something worrying is happening at Arsenal and it’s being ignored
arts.sum: Arsenal lost 1-0 to West Ham at the weekend, seriously denting their title chances. Arsenal were poor against West Ham, and Martin Odegaard was heavily...

arts.ttl: ‘Over my dead body’ – Arsenal boss Arteta refuses to give up on Premier League title
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says no team has ever won the Premier League title in their circumstances – but won’t stop fighting until it’s mathematically impossible. The Gunners’ chances were dealt a massive blow at the weekend as they lost 1-0 at home to West Ham United, allowing Liverpool to pull eight points clear at […] The post ‘Over my dead body’ – Arsenal boss Arteta refuses to give up on Premier League title first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: What West Ham fans are now saying about James Ward-Prowse after leaving Nottingham Forest
Every word from Mikel Arteta's pre-Forest presser
arts.sum: He was asked about the latest team news, his reflections on the weekend's defeat to West Ham United and where it leaves the title race, and his thoughts on Forest's incredible campaign so far. I’m not going to stop - over my dead body that we stop thinking that way and putting everything we possibly can to increase that probability of us winning, being better than the opponent and hitting that performance, those standards constantly, regardless of what happens.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Citizens to use Erling Haaland to lure Arsenal, Liverpool target to Etihad?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly hopeful of beating both Arsenal and Liverpool in the race to sign a £20m-rated midfield wonderkid.

arts.ttl: Arteta on giving up on title: 'Over my dead body'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has said he would give up on Arsenal's title hopes "over my dead body" but added that it will require his side to do something unprecedented

arts.ttl: Arsenal are big losers from VAR with Gunners benefitting from just ONE overturn all season
arts.sum: Arsenal have felt a little hamstrung by VAR calls this term, but while they've suffered more than most at the hands of the technology, they aren't the worst-affected team when it comes to overturns
